items.title: Pacers announced the signings of Kobe Brown (two-way) and Larry Nance Jr earlier. Micah Potter has officially been waived. Pacers with 17 under contract + Braden Smith (draft rights) and Jalen Slawson (qualifying offer) in their orbit right now.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Pacers announced the signings of Kobe Brown (two-way) and Larry Nance Jr earlier. Micah Potter has officially been waived. Pacers with 17 under contract + Braden Smith (draft rights) and Jalen Slawson (qualifying offer) in their orbit right now.

items.title: Pacers officially announce signing of Larry Nance Jr. to a standard contract, Kobe Brown to a two-way deal.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Pacers officially announce signing of Larry Nance Jr. to a standard contract, Kobe Brown to a two-way deal.

They have Brown, Taelon Peter, and Ethan Thompson on their three two-way deals. With rookie Braden Smith expected to secure one.

We may see it play out at Summer League

items.title: Pacers reached agreement on a one-year deal with veteran Larry Nance Jr., league source confirmed to Fieldhouse Files.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Pacers reached agreement on a one-year deal with veteran Larry Nance Jr., league source confirmed to Fieldhouse Files.

They're already a tax team — they have all year to get under — and Nance Jr. would count ~$2.45M against the cap.

He'll become the 15th player under contract
